jobs.title: Anthropic Fellows Program — AI Security
jobs.location: London, UK; Ontario, CAN; Remote-Friendly, United States; San Francisco, CA

A.reason: AI Security Fellow loosely aligns with target roles (AI/ML Engineer). 3 years experience is appropriate - fellowship accepts early-career candidates. Domain expertise partially matches: has ML/AI background but not specifically security/pentesting.

B.reason: Strong Python skills match requirement. Smart contract and blockchain expertise directly relevant - job mentions blockchain exploit detection project. Missing formal pentesting/CVE experience, but transferable security mindset from blockchain work.

C.reason: Remote-friendly in US/UK/Canada locations matches preference. Weekly stipend $3,850 equates to ~$154k annualized - within target range but for only 4 months. No red-flag keywords. Work authorization required.

D.reason: Anthropic is top-tier AI company (creator of Claude). Clear JD with defined expectations. 25-50% receive full-time offers. Mentorship from leading researchers. Strong growth potential.

jobs.summary: Strong fit - blockchain/smart contract expertise directly aligns with AI Security workstream focus on smart contract exploits.
interview_prep: STAR story: Describe a time you identified a security vulnerability or ambiguity and took ownership to resolve it
STAR story: Explain your experience with smart contracts and how you've applied technical skills to blockchain security
jobs.tailored_summary: AI/ML Engineer with 3 years experience in machine learning and blockchain technology. Founded Zorox Research Lab with hands-on experience in smart contract security. Python-proficient with practical AI education experience teaching 100+ students. Passionate about applied AI and LLM technologies - eager to contribute to AI security research at Anthropic.

jobs.title: Anthropic Fellows Program — ML Systems & Performance
jobs.location: London, UK; Ontario, CAN; Remote-Friendly, United States; San Francisco, CA

A.reason: Fellowship is a research training program, not a traditional ML engineering role. Candidate's target roles include ML Engineer but this is a 4-month fellowship with non-traditional career path. Some alignment with ML systems focus.

B.reason: Strong Python skills match. ML/AI/LLM experience aligns. Blockchain smart contract work interestingly ties to JD's mention of 'AI agents find $4.6M in smart contract exploits'. Missing: large-scale distributed systems, HPC, direct LLM training/fine-tuning experience.

C.reason: Remote-friendly in US/UK/Canada aligns with candidate's remote preference. However, stipend is only ~$3,850/week (~$61-80k annualized) - far below candidate's $120-200k target. Must have work authorization - no visa sponsorship. 4-month commitment may be flexible.

D.reason: Anthropic is a top-tier AI company with excellent reputation. Clear JD with defined research areas. 25-50% conversion rate to full-time roles. Strong mentorship and research output focus.

jobs.summary: Strong company/role alignment but salary gap is prohibitive - fellowship pays ~$61-80k vs candidate's $120-200k target.
interview_prep: STAR: Building ML/AI systems or pipelines
STAR: Blockchain/smart contract security work (relates to JD's smart contract exploit example)
jobs.tailored_summary: AI/ML Engineer with Python, ML, and blockchain experience. The JD's mention of smart contract exploit detection aligns with candidate's background. However, the fellowship stipend of ~$61-80k is far below the $120-200k target.
